name: openclaw-relaycast
description: Relaycast bridge for OpenClaw — messaging, identity, runtime setup, and local spawning

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('ldd --version 2>&1',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch{try{require('child_process').execSync('apk info gcompat 2>/dev/null',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch{console.warn('
⚠️  openclaw-relaycast: Alpine detected without gcompat. Spawning requires glibc.
   Install with: apk add gcompat libstdc++
')}}"
